name: Scottish Oat Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Add baking soda to boiling water and let stand until cool.
2. Mix together flour, baking powder, salt, bran flakes, rolled oats, and sugar in a large bowl. Cut in shortening using your fingers or a pastry cutter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add the boiling water and baking soda to the dry ingredients, stirring with a fork until a dough forms.
4. Turn off heat source for the water and remove from the stove.
5. Lightly flour a clean work surface and roll out the dough thinly on the floured surface using a rolling pin until it is about 1/8 inch thick.
6. Using a round biscuit cutter or a glass, cut out the oat cakes and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake in a hot oven (400°F/200°C) until golden brown and crisp, about 15-20 minutes, turning once halfway through cooking time.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool completely on a wire rack before serving.
